name: Image Tools
description: Manipulate images stored in Gumm or loaded from URLs. Resize, crop, convert formats (JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF), rotate, flip, apply filters (grayscale, blur, sharpen, normalize), and inspect image metadata.
examples: Convert photo.jpg to WebP with 80% quality
Crop the image to 400x400 starting from the top-left corner
What are the dimensions and format of my image?

commands.name: images
commands.shortDescription: List and manage images stored in Gumm
commands.description: Use the storage_list tool to list images currently stored in Gumm. Show filename, size, and upload date for each. If text is provided after /images, interpret it as an operation request (e.g. 'resize X to 800px', 'convert X to webp') and execute the corresponding image_tools operation.
